farro-and-tomato-salad-with-fish-sauce-v.name: Farro And Tomato Salad With Fish-sauce Vinaigrette
instructions: Whisk garlic, fish sauce, vinegar, sugar, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until sugar dissolves.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.
Cook farro in a medium pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until tender, 20–25 minutes. Drain; transfer to a large bowl.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook scallions, turning occasionally, until charred all over, about 4 minutes. Transfer to bowl with farro. Add both types of tomatoes, cucumbers, parsley, and tarragon and toss to combine. Add vinaigrette and toss again to coat; season with pepper.

fasolakia-greek-green-beans.name: Fasolakia (greek Green Beans)
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Stir in onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add green beans and stir until coated in oil. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 to 3 minutes. Add puréed tomatoes, potatoes, salt, pepper, and sugar. Stir well, then add enough water to barely cover beans.

Cover the saucepan partially with a lid. Bring to a simmer over medium-low heat and cook gently until green beans and potatoes are soft, 25 to 30 minutes. Uncover towards the end of cooking to reduce sauce if it is too watery.

fat-free-flour-free-refined-sugar-free-c.name: Fat-free, Flour-free, Refined Sugar-free Cake
instructions: 1. Firstly mix bananas and eggs, then other materials from the cake mortar consistency in blender.
2. Oil a thin long cake mold and discharge it into the mortar.
3. Bake about 30-40 minutes in the oven heated to 180 degrees before.
4. Serve after cooling.
5. * Formsante Magazine
6. You can also try unconditional and non-sweet cake recipe.

fennel-and-zucchini-soup-with-warm-tomat.name: Fennel And Zucchini Soup With Warm Tomato Relish
instructions: Heat 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil in large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add diced fennel, zucchini, onion, and fennel seeds. Sauté until fennel is translucent, 4 to 5 minutes. Add broth; bring to boil. Cover; reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes. Puree in blender until smooth; return soup to saucepan. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1/2 tablespoon olive oil in medium skillet over medium heat. Add tomatoes and sauté until just heated through, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Mix in 1 tablespoon chopped fennel fronds; season relish with salt and pepper. Serve soup with relish.

fennel-gratin-with-walnut-thyme-breadcru.name: Fennel Gratin With Walnut-thyme Breadcrumbs
instructions: Place rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 400°. Place fennel, onion, cream, butter, and 1 Tbsp. thyme in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper and toss to combine. Transfer to an 8x8" baking dish; bake until fennel is crisp-tender and cream is reduced by half, 30–35 minutes.

While fennel is baking, combine breadcrumbs, walnuts, and oil in a medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper and toss until bread is evenly saturated and walnuts are coated. Add Parmesan and remaining 1 Tbsp. thyme and toss again to combine.
Scatter breadcrumb mixture evenly over gratin and bake until breadcrumbs and walnuts are deep golden brown and fennel is tender, 12–15 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.

fet-fisks-grilled-cabbage-caesar.name: Fet-fisk’s Grilled Cabbage Caesar

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

instructions:
Combine ½ cup vegetable oil and 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a measuring glass. Place 1 large egg yolk, 1 small garlic clove, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, 1 Tbsp. red wine vinegar, 2 tsp. fish sauce, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. freshly ground pepper in a tall glass or jar. Using an immersion blender, blend until smooth and frothy, about 30 seconds. With the motor running, gradually pour in oil mixture in a thin, steady stream; blend until dressing is thick and emulsified, about 1 minute. Add 8 oil-packed anchovy fillets and blend until incorporated, about 45 seconds. If dressing is very thick, add up to 2 tsp. water to loosen. (Alternatively, you can use a regular blender to make the dressing if needed.)
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Cut 1 medium head of cabbage (about 2 lb.) into 8 wedges, keeping core intact. Drizzle generously with extra-virgin olive oil and season with kosher salt. Grill cabbage, cut side down, undisturbed, until charred underneath, 10–15 minutes. Turn over on other cut side and grill until tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a large plate or rimmed baking sheet and chill until cold, at least 2 hours.
Cook ½ cup panko and 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until panko is golden brown, 6–9 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and let cool.

Remove cores and charred outer leaves from cabbage. (Once the outer leaves are removed, there will be only a thin edge of char left on each leaf—just enough to add visual interest and some deep caramelized flavor to the final dish.) Separate remaining tender leaves and transfer to a large bowl. Add half of reserved breadcrumbs and ¼ cup finely grated Parmesan.

Brush 2 Tbsp. dressing over a platter to coat. Drizzle remaining dressing over cabbage mixture in bowl and toss to combine and coat leaves evenly; season with salt and freshly ground pepper. Pile dressed cabbage on platter, then scatter 6 boquerones (marinated white anchovies), more Parmesan, and remaining breadcrumbs over. Season salad with more pepper.
Do Ahead: Cabbage can be grilled 1 day ahead. Wrap tightly and keep chilled.

fig-cake-traditional-in-the-oven-or-in-t.name: Fig Cake, Traditional In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
fig-cake-traditional-in-the-oven-or-in-t.original_name: Bizcocho de higos, tradicional al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 2 cups (with the measure of yogurt) of sugar (about 200 g)
1 vasito de aceite de girasol o de oliva suave (unos 120 ml)
1 teaspoon of vanilla essence or lemon fringes
Butter and brown sugar for mold

instructions: We grease a rectangular mold (30 × 20 cm) with butter and sprinkle brown sugar at the base.
Lavamos los higos y los partimos por la mitad.
Los colocamos en el molde con el corte hacia abajo, cubriendo todo el fondo.
In a bowl, we put the yogurt and use the vessel as a measure. We added two cups of sugar and pounding.
We add three eggs and we beat till the mixture remains sparkling.
Vertemos un vasito de aceite y la vainilla o ralladura, y mezclamos bien.
Incorporamos tres vasitos de harina, la levadura y la pizca de sal, removiendo con suavidad hasta obtener una masa lisa.
Vertemos la mezcla sobre los higos y nivelamos la superficie.
We baked at 180 ° C (heat up and down) for about 40 minutes, till the stick goes clear.
We let them cool about 10 minutes and we crumble upside down so that the figs will get up with their caramelized juice.

firehouse-chicken.name: Firehouse Chicken
instructions: Purée garlic, vinegar, olive oil, salt, parsley, paprika, pepper, and ½ cup vegetable oil in a blender until smooth. Place chicken in a large resealable plastic bag and pour marinade over. Seal bag and chill chicken 1–3 days.
Remove chicken from marinade and pat dry with paper towels. Let sit uncovered at room temperature 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 400°. Heat remaining ½ cup vegetable oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat. Place 1 chicken half, skin side down, in skillet, set another skillet or heavy pot on top, and add a couple of cans to weigh it down. Cook until skin is browned and crisp, 15–20 minutes. Transfer chicken to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining chicken half.

Roast chicken in oven, skin side up, until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes before slicing.

fish-burrito-recipe-comedera.name: Fish Burrito Recipe
instructions: Cut the hake into medium pieces and reserve.
Peel ion and chew into small cubes. Filling garlic teeth.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and sock the garlic and ion for a few minutes.
It incorporates fish cut into pieces, Saxony with salt, pepper and oregano to taste.
Mix and cook for about 5 minutes till dart and soften.
Swallow the lemon juice and finish cooking for 4 more minutes or till the fish's ready. Turn and put them out.
Peel and paddle. Remove the tomato stem and cut into slices. Stretch the cilantro.
Wash lettuce with plenty of vinegar to remove any impurity. Drain.
Warm the omelette up a little.
To set up the burrito, put the omelette and put the lettuce up. Make a bed with tomato and avocado.
Add the portion of the fish, the tanned cilantro and tit with your favorite wiles. Roll up the burrito and get ready.

flan-mexicano-mexican-flan.name: Flan Mexicano (mexican Flan)
instructions: Place sugar into a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until sugar melts and turns a golden amber color, about 10 minutes. Watch carefully once syrup begins to change color because it burns quickly. Carefully pour caramel syrup into a flan mold. Set aside to cool.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Place an oven rack in the middle position.

Place sweetened condensed milk, whole milk, eggs, egg yolks, orange juice, orange zest, vanilla, and cornstarch into a blender; blend until smooth, about 1 minute. Pour in cream and pulse several times to incorporate. Pour mixture over cooled caramel syrup in the flan mold.

Line a roasting pan with a damp kitchen towel. Place the filled flan mold carefully on the towel in the roasting pan, then place the roasting pan on the oven rack. Fill the roasting pan with enough boiling water to reach halfway up the sides of the flan mold.
Bake in the preheated oven until the center of flan is set but still slightly jiggles when nudged, 45 minutes to 1 hour. Let cool, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours.

To serve, run a sharp paring knife around the inside of the mold to release flan. Place a serving plate on the mold, then flip the mold over. Gently lift the mold to release flan and allow caramel syrup to cascade over custard. Remove the mold.

fluffy-pan-cake-argiro.name: Fluffy Pan Cake
instructions: In a stringing bowl, add the butter, sugar, vanilla and egg.
Beat for a few minutes with the hand mixer until it hangs and fluffys the mixture for cake.
Mix the cake mixture with a wooden sponge, alternatively adding the flower and milk.
In a well buttered and flowered small baking pan of 20 to 22 cm, pour the mixture for cake.
Bake in a well preheated ocean at 170.3.3. Degrees in resistance to the Middle grill of the evening for about 30 minutes.
Leave the cake mixture on a rack on our bench for 5 minutes.
Disforme the easy baking cake and rub it with the Melted butter.
Add cinnamon and sugar.
We always serve it warm.

fluffy-sour-cream-biscuits.name: Fluffy Sour Cream Biscuits
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Whisk flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together in a bowl; cut in shortening until mixture is crumbly. Add milk and sour cream; stir until dough comes together.
Turn dough out onto a floured work surface; knead 10 times. Roll dough out; cut into biscuits. Place biscuits on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until biscuits are lightly browned, about 10 minutes.

folar-rich-in-meat-teleculinaria.name: Folar Rich In Meat

ingredients.item: 20 g de fermento seco de padeiro
100 g de entremeada de porco salgada e demolhada

instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water. Lay the flour on the countertop, open a cavity, add the salt, sugar, olive oil, eggs, softened butter and the mixture of yeast, mix well and work well until you get off the bench and hands. Make a ball with the dough, put it in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cover it with a cloth and let it leave in a warm place until triplicate the volume.

Cut the meats and sausages into little pieces. Gently heat the oven tray with olive oil. Lay the dough back on the flour-pushed countertop, work it a little and then extend it in rectangle form. Spread the meats and sausages on top and in the central part, fold the margins inside so as to cover, place on the board and leave another 40 minutes.

Brush with beaten egg and take it to the oven preheated at 180oC for about 45 minutes. If you find out you're getting too much color, lower the oven temperature to 160 degrees. Then remove, let it cool down a bit and serve warm or cold.

french-charlotte-cake-pequerecetas.name: French Charlotte Cake

ingredients.item: Un lazo decorativo (opcional pero muy recomendable)
200 g of fresh raspberries (plus some whole to add inside)
200 ml cream to be assembled (at least 35% m.g.)
150 g de queso crema tipo philadelphia
4 hojas de gelatina neutra (o 7 g en polvo)
2 hojas de gelatina (o 3 g en polvo)

instructions: We prepare the detachable mold, preferably 20 cm. We have broken the base with oven paper and put the sunny biscuits around, standing and well glued. We can also cover the background with some half-broken biscuits

We moisturized all 4 Jelatin leaves in cold water for 5-10 minutes. We cross the 200 g raspberries with the sugar glas. If we don't want seeds, we get them. We heat up the milk (30 ml) and remove it from the fire and dissolve the drained Jelly. We mixed with raspberry purée. We have a cold cream. We add the cream cheese and we beat up and integrate. We gradually integrate raspberry mixture with wrapped movements. Let's put this raspberry mousse into the mold and distribute some whole raspberries inside. We put and get to the refrigerator 1 hour to put up before we put the next cape.

We hydrate both Jelatin leaves in cold water. We heat up the 20 ml milk and dissolve the drained jelly. We ride the cream with the sugar glas. We add the cream cheese and we mix. We integrate Jelatin with wrapped movements and have a homogenous cream. Let's carefully sew onto the already curved raspberry layer and smooth the surface. We refrigerate at least 3 more hours (or better from day to day)
Just before we serve, we decorated with fresh raspberries and green leaves. We can tie a bow around to hold the biscuits and make them more elegant.

french-pate-de-campagne-recipe-comedera.name: French pâté de Campagne Recipe
french-pate-de-campagne-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de paté de campagne francés

When completely chilled, clear and ready to enjoy.

fresh-basil-pesto.name: Fresh Basil Pesto

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine basil leaves, oil, pine nuts, and garlic in a food processor or blender; purée until smooth.
Stir in Pecorino Romano cheese; season to taste with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

fresh-fish-sandwich-with-lemon-and-delic.name: Fresh Fish Sandwich With Lemon: And Delicious Recipe
fresh-fish-sandwich-with-lemon-and-delic.original_name: Sandwich de pescado fresco con limón: receta fácil y deliciosa

ingredients.item: 1 baguette or crispy bread of your choice
1  filete de pescado blanco (merluza, tilapia o similar)
½ onion cut into fine rings
Leaves of fresh nuts or lettuce
½ teaspoon of sweet peppermint or red pepper
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: First, get the fish ready. Dry up the steak with absorbing paper and have salt, black pepper and some sweet peppermint or red pepper to give a touch of color and taste.

In a frying pan with medium-high heat, heats olive oil and cooks fish for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden and tender on the inside. Remove him from his fire and let him stand for a few minutes.
Meanwhile, cut the bread in half and, if you wish, have it slightly in the same frying pan so that it gets crispy.

On one of the halves of bread, put with mayonnaise or alioli if you decide to use them. He then puts the ruula or lettuce leaves as his base. Add fish, followed by tomato cuts and fresh onion rings. Expand some lemon onto the fish to highlight the flavors and close the sandwich with the other half of the bread.
Serves immediately with a pair of slice of lemon next door if anyone wants more citrus touch.

fresh-ginger-moscow-mule.name: Fresh Ginger Moscow Mule
instructions: Combine vodka, simple syrup, lime juice, and ginger in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a highball glass filled with ice; top off with club soda and garnish with lime wedge and candied ginger.

fried-chicken-hearts-recipe-comedera.name: Fried Chicken Hearts Recipe
fried-chicken-hearts-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de corazones de pollo fritos
instructions: Cleans chicken hearts well, withdrawing any residue of blood or fat. Rinse them under cold water and seal them with absorbing paper.
Put your hearts into a bowl and season them with salt, pepper, garlic powder, pimenton and cumin. Let them rest for at least 20 minutes so that they get their flavors well absorbed.
While we're waiting, prepare three bouncing stations. In one bowl put the wheat flour, in another padded bread with maicene and in another bowl beat both eggs.
It passes every chicken heart first through the flour, then through the beaten egg, and finally through the mixture of padded bread and corn. Be sure to cover them completely.

Warm up enough oil in a frying pan with medium-high heat. When the oil's hot, fry chicken hearts into small pits, preventing them from pounding. Cooking for 5-7 minutes, turning them to be put to sleep. Remove them while they are golden and crisp and place them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Serves hot chicken hearts with lemon cuts.

fried-pumpkin-a-crunchy-and-delicious-de.name: Fried Pumpkin: A Crunchy And Delicious Dessert
fried-pumpkin-a-crunchy-and-delicious-de.original_name: Fritos de calabaza: un postre crujiente y delicioso

In a frying pan, place pumpkin with butter and brown sugar. Cover and cook with medium heat till pumpkin's soft.
Trips the baked pumpkin and place it in a bowl, adds the egg, extra brown sugar and flour. Mix well up to get a consistent mass.
It heats abundant sunflower oil in a frying pan, takes portions of the dough and frying them till they are golden from both sides. Retire and scrain onto absorbing paper.
Sprinkle with glass sugar before serving and enjoy hot or room temperature.

fried-shrimp-recipe-comedera.name: Fried Shrimp Recipe

We put them into a kitchen paper to remove excess oil.
We put them to a plate and to eat and add some drops of lemon as they serve them.

frisee-and-wild-mushroom-salad-with-poac.name: Frisée And Wild Mushroom Salad With Poached Egg

ingredients.prep: morels, oyster, and crimini), thickly sliced

ingredients.item: French breakfast radishes or other small radishes

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Place mushrooms in large bowl. Toss with 4 tablespoons oil. Scatter mushrooms on rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle with coarse salt and pepper. Roast until tender, stirring occasionally, 25 to 30 minutes. Cool up to 2 hours.

Place large bowl of cool water near stovetop. Pour additional water into large skillet to reach depth of 2 inches. Add 1 tablespoon lemon juice and generous sprinkling of coarse salt to skillet. Bring water to simmer over medium heat. Crack eggs, 1 at a time, into water (whites may spread). Simmer until whites are cooked through and yolks are still soft, occasionally spooning water over, about 3 minutes.

Using slotted spoon, transfer eggs to bowl of cool water. Reserve skillet with poaching water. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Bring reserved skillet of water to simmer. Rewarm eggs 1 minute.

Whisk remaining 2 tablespoons oil and 2 tablespoons lemon juice in another large bowl to blend. Season dressing to taste with coarse salt and pepper. Add frisée, radishes, and mushrooms and toss to coat. Divide salad among plates. Top each salad with poached egg and serve.

fruit-nougat-step-by-step-comedera.name: Fruit Nougat Step By Step

instructions: Using a microwave-safe bowl, melt the chocolate, butter, and shortening in the microwave in 30-second increments until completely melted, stirring in between each increment. Set aside to cool slightly as you complete the other steps.
In a medium bowl, whisk the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, salt, and espresso powder until combined.
In a large bowl using a hand mixer or a stand mixer with a paddle attachment, whip the sugar and eggs on high speed for a full 5 minutes. The mixture will look frothy and lighter in color.
Add the vanilla, followed by the mixture of melted chocolate, butter, and shortening in a slow and steady stream on low speed until fully combined.
Add the dry ingredients in two additions and mix on low speed by hand until just combined. Don’t over-mix. Finally, mix in the mini chocolate chips.
Cover and chill the cookie dough for 1 hour in the fridge.

Preheat your oven to 177°C and prepare 2 half sheet trays with parchment paper. Scoop dough into balls, rolling them to make them slightly taller before you place them on the tray 2-3 inches apart, no more than 8 cookies per tray. Bake for 13-16 minutes until the edges look set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for at least 10 minutes before serving.
